name: setMyName
description: Use this method to change the bot's name

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New bot name; 0-64 characters. Pass an empty string to remove the dedicated name for the given language.

parameters.name: language_code
parameters.description: A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code. If empty, the name will be shown to all users for whose language there is no dedicated name.
